perturbation.original_text: Visitor will not photograph, vid eotape, or otherwise make any record of or preserve any Confidential Information to which he/she may be given access during the facility tour(s).
perturbation.changed_text: Visitor may photograph, vid eotape, or otherwise make record of Confidential Information to which he/she may be given access during the facility tour(s).
perturbation.explanation: This change completely reverses the restriction on recording Confidential Information. Section 4 originally prohibited any form of recording, while this version permits it. This creates a direct and irreconcilable contradiction regarding whether recording is allowed.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Visitor may photograph, vid eotape, or otherwise make record of Confidential Information to which he/she may be given access during the facility tour(s).
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the original text and the contradicted text (which is identical to the changed text in this case). The original text prohibited recording Confidential Information, while the changed text permits it. This creates a clear and irreconcilable contradiction, as stated in the Perturbation Explanation.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement constitutes the entire Agre ement between the parties hereto with respect to the subject matter.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement may be supplemented by additional agreements between the parties hereto with respect to the subject matter.
perturbation.explanation: The original text in section 7 contains an integration clause stating this agreement is the entire agreement. Modifying it so that it 'may be supplemented by additional agreements' directly contradicts the entire agreement clause. This creates confusion as to what encompasses the entire agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement may be supplemented by additional agreements between the parties hereto with respect to the subject matter.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated the agreement was the 'entire agreement.' The changed text modifies this to say the agreement 'may be supplemented by additional agreements.' This creates a direct contradiction because if the agreement is the 'entire agreement,' it cannot also be supplemented by additional agreements. The contradicted text is the same as the changed text, further illustrating the contradiction because the changed text goes against the original text, making it so that the agreement is no longer the 'entire agreement,' but an agreement open to supplements.

perturbation.original_text: Visitor understands that his or her breach of this Agreement may subject him or her and his or her employees to liability.
perturbation.changed_text: Visitor understands that his or her breach of this Agreement will not subject him or her and his or her employees to liability.
perturbation.explanation: By changing 'may subject him or her and his or her employees to liability' in section 8 to 'will not subject him or her and his or her employees to liability' directly contradicts the original text and creates uncertainty about the consequences of breaching the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Visitor understands that his or her breach of this Agreement will not subject him or her and his or her employees to liability.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that a breach 'may subject' the visitor to liability, while the changed text asserts that a breach 'will not subject' the visitor to liability. The contradicted text mirrors the changed text, stating 'will not subject'. This creates a direct conflict within the document regarding the consequences of a breach, leading to an in-text contradiction and uncertainty about the visitor's liability. This aligns with the definition of 'Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction', where the same clause exists in multiple locations with conflicting implications.
